descriptions.value: Two groups meet up at the Old Airfield, looking to scour it together.
A lone soldier makes a dash for cover whilst under fire in a tight market alley.
A lone player finds a stash of weapon crates inside a derelict storehouse.
I lost, but at least they enjoyed it!
An old-school background for a modern sport
The pit is there and wants you. He'll get you unless you play really well...
When your ability is not enough, use the force.
Love & hate. You want it near, but far.

How sweet to be a Cloud
Floating in the Blue!
Every little cloud
Always sings aloud.

How sweet to be a Cloud
Floating in the Blue!
It makes him very proud
To be a little cloud.
Greed is poisoning his soul.
One man can drastically change history with only one invention.
Power corrupts.
The new hope of Steam kingdom.
Mysterious rock formation, called Circle of Wisdom. Many ostriches think it was created by the Great Ostrich. In reality the circle was created by natives to protect the garden from pesky ostriches.
Oh, those Idols of Perseverance! Many brave  ostriches broke their legs trying to conquer it.
Nobody knows who created this statue and, most importantly, why it was put on that island. Anyway, ostriches worship it, considering it to be the Mother of all ostriches.
Underground passage was build to simplify travel between islands. Unfortunately, it was much easy to come in, than to get out. So it was abandoned.
Yep. Lots of shark here. But hey, that's the place where ostriches realized that they could run under water!
Abandon all hope ye who enter here. This is Silent Krill. Rare ostrich will find that exit gates.

Many people mistakenly think the sunken idols fell under  water because of some cataclysm. This is exactly the effect the ancient masters tried to achieve by placing those idols underwater intentionally.
Only you can help her bring peace to the universe...
A wealthy heiress to a galactic empire. What does she want with you?
Highly trained fighter pilots of the Confederation.
Brave pilots of the Yamada clan, always ready for a fight!
Trigger happy mercenaries, don't cross them or else!
Maybe slower, but much more comical!
Deep in the woods, evil is plotting...
Worst. Exercise. EVER!
Cheating is mandatory!
Are these really worth hoarding?
Even without the bath, this would be a heavy load!
Heart of the designer
Fisherman at work
Bulb
Wall with circles
Watermelon close-up
Fly and drop bombs on the planted area
Slide and jump over the plants
Explode when touched and can detect an enemy passing over it
Block the enemy from jumping over it, and can injure if touched
The most powerful boar with magic power

descriptions.value: The Ranger often has a great toolbox for scouting its surroundings, spotting nearby enemies. Some enemies are wise to avoid while sometimes, a well placed bow shot will do the trick!

descriptions.name: The Ranger
descriptions.type: Lord of the Dark Castle Trading Card

descriptions.value: A Rogue is an expert at sneaking onto its enemies from behind for a quick and merciless backstab to inflict a huge amount of damage. A sharpened dagger and silent clothes, and your enemies will never know what killed them.

descriptions.name: The Rogue
descriptions.type: Lord of the Dark Castle Trading Card

descriptions.value: Touch and strong, he often uses his favorite weapon, a big fat axe. Roaring, he charges into big hoardes of enemies, going berserk while swinging at multiple opponents at the same time.

descriptions.name: The Barbarian
descriptions.type: Lord of the Dark Castle Trading Card

descriptions.value: Armed with a strong faith, the Paladin enters the dungeon, ready with prayers to drive away the Evil from the darkest depths. The Holy Knight is here to save the world! Demons, beware!

descriptions.name: The Paladin
descriptions.type: Lord of the Dark Castle Trading Card

descriptions.value: A steadfast warrior, well trained in using any kind of armor and proficient in most weapon skills, this fighter is ready for battle. No need to sneak - just keep em' coming!

descriptions.name: The Warrior
descriptions.type: Lord of the Dark Castle Trading Card

descriptions.value: If this one sees you, your days are counted. So if you see him first, run! And a dark voice echoes behind you: You can run, but you can never hide!

descriptions.name: The Death Knight
descriptions.type: Lord of the Dark Castle Trading Card
